$comment: Source of truth for EPF/PPF/NPS rates. No reliable public JSON API exists; update this file when a new rate is notified. Served by GET /api/rates/instruments.

epf.notes: Declared by EPFO for FY 2024-25. Credited yearly. Check EPFO WhatsNew page for the latest annual notification.

ppf.notes: Small savings rate, notified quarterly by Ministry of Finance (DEA). Has been unchanged at 7.1% since Q1 FY 2020-21.

nps.notes: 10-year historical averages, rough. Tier-I defaults. User should tune in Settings for their actual PFM.
